name: accessible-nature
description: Making paths clear for everyone. Track trails, report barriers, and discover accessible routes.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run build && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run build && npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:build:android: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.cap:build:android:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease

author: Access Nature Team
